spec_match.rationale: chrome-devtools-mcp verified the real DOM probe opens popover=auto first and then popover=hint; Chrome Canary 151 kept both elements :popover-open, matching the Chrome 150 coexistence contract.

interactive.rationale: Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp: the Auto #1 -> Hint #1 rule probe left both popovers open, and the Hint #1 -> Auto #2 rule probe left only Auto #2 open after the unrelated auto hid the hint.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned perfectly with the parent layer inspector description.

edge_cases.rationale: The support state distinguishes basic Popover API support, hint value reflection, actual auto-then-hint coexistence, and the reverse unrelated-auto-hides-hint rule.

references.rationale: The see also block now includes the official ChromeStatus feature link, verified in chrome-devtools-mcp.

design_system.rationale: Perfect formatting leveraging precise colorized cards, outline frames, and nice numbers.

summary: chrome-devtools-mcp 1.1.1 with Chrome Canary 151.0.0.0 verified both rule probes, clean console, ChromeStatus link presence, and the feature conformance route reporting 6 PASS / 0 FAIL.
